subject: Create comprehensive preprocessing audit report
description: Synthesize all findings into single audit report (markdown): (1) Executive summary (what works, what's missing). (2) Detailed findings per phase (data integrity, feature engineering, stationarity, seasonality, parameters). (3) Critical issues (blockers for thesis/System A). (4) Recommendations (fix now vs document vs defer to Phase 5). (5) Decision matrix: priority × effort × impact. Output: preprocessing_audit_report.md (2000+ words)
